demoArgs: zit ltektz dtllqut iortl of hsqof louiz wxz zit stzztkl ziqz qhhtqk zit dglz gyztf qkt zit tqln gftl zg uxtll
title: Letter fingerprints: the secret message vs typical English
setup:
# --- plot helper (hidden) — letter frequencies of a ciphertext vs English ---
# Typical English letter frequencies (percent), indexed a..z.
__ENG_PCT = [8.2, 1.5, 2.8, 4.3, 12.7, 2.2, 2.0, 6.1, 7.0, 0.15, 0.77, 4.0, 2.4, 6.7, 7.5, 1.9, 0.095, 6.0, 6.3, 9.1, 2.8, 0.98, 2.4, 0.15, 2.0, 0.074]

def __counts(text):
    c = [0] * 26
    for ch in text:
        if "a" <= ch <= "z":
            c[ord(ch) - 97] += 1
    return c

def __plot(cipher):
    counts = __counts(cipher)
    total = sum(counts)
    cipher_pts = [[i, counts[i]] for i in range(26)]
    # scale English percentages to the same total so the shapes compare
    eng_pts = [[i, round(__ENG_PCT[i] / 100.0 * total, 2)] for i in range(26)]
    return [
        {"name": "secret message", "points": cipher_pts, "highlight": True},
        {"name": "typical English (scaled)", "points": eng_pts, "highlight": False},
    ]
